name: Koala 13B
license: Research-only: LLaMA non-commercial license (base weights) + OpenAI ToS (ShareGPT-derived data); training/serving code Apache-2.0
note: LLaMA 13B fine-tuned on curated web dialogue (ShareGPT + HC3); a parallel academic effort to Vicuna, often preferred over Alpaca in blind human evals.
tpsNote: 13B at Q4 fits comfortably in 24GB VRAM; no model-specific RTX 4090 llama.cpp measurement found, though similarly-sized Llama models typically reach 60-90 tok/s.
